items.title: No wasted roster spots
items.body_excerpt: CJ McCollum after hitting a game winner to put the Hawks up 2-1 in their playoff series against the New York Knicks. KEVIN C. COX/GETTY IMAGES One of the NBA’s burning questions: How do you beat the Knicks in the playoffs? Almost nobody could. The Spurs, Cavaliers, and…

items.title: Superpowers are built with superstar discounts
items.body_excerpt: Victor Wembanyama took a potential discount from the Spurs on his extension, mimicking two Thunder stars, the reigning Finals MVP and two older legends. Good morning. Is this how the band Dire Straights got its name? Let's basketball. Victor Wembanyama unsurprisingly quickly…
